title: Add auth_service unit tests for token lifecycle
description: Add tests/unit/test_auth_service.py covering the 3 auth_service methods: test_generate_token_returns_string (assert isinstance result, str), test_verify_token_valid (create token then verify, assert user_id matches), test_verify_token_invalid (verify with bad token, assert returns None), test_refresh_token_valid (refresh a valid token, assert new token returned), test_refresh_token_invalid (refresh with bad token, assert returns None). Use AuthService() with a real JWT_SECRET='test-secret' env var set via monkeypatch.
acceptance: pytest tests/unit/test_auth_service.py -v — all 5 tests pass; no DATABASE_URL or network calls required; test names match exactly: test_generate_token_returns_string, test_verify_token_valid, test_verify_token_invalid, test_refresh_token_valid, test_refresh_token_invalid
